title: cratoxylum formosum
intro: Cratoxylum formosum, also known as Taiwan mahogany, is a tropical plant species native to Taiwan and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Cratoxylum formosum is often used as a decoction or infusion to make teas, tinctures, and ointments that can be used to treat various ailments.
